text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Everyone, I must thank you for<n>inviting me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I feel truly honored to be having tea<n>with you all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't have to act all formal<n>just because
you're in the presence<n>of a first-rate athlete such
as myself,<n>Satono!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Please speak freely and<n>eat as many
sweets as you like!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Here, have a seat. Let's enjoy this<n>day together,
Satono.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Would you care for some jam<n>cookies with your
tea? They're a<n>delicacy, kindly sent by my
grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! So the recent charity cup was<n>also hosted
by your family, Satono?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I helped my parents with the<n>event, though I
didn't do much.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I'd heard stories, but your<n>family certainly
is enthusiastic about<n>this stuff.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Your parents' names are often<n>mentioned in my
own social circles.<n>They're said to be quite
wealthy and<n>philanthropic.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Goodness. I'm delighted that you<n>know of them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I think it's just so lovely of you to<n>help out your
parents!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Ever since I was a child, I've<n>been
watching my parents helping<n>others...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So naturally, I found myself hoping to<n>follow in
their footsteps!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I know just what you mean! "A<n>princess must be
of service!" Isn't<n>that right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A house of distinguished nobility and<n>renowned
philanthropists...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...that went on to produce an<n>Umamusume who is
now enrolled at<n>Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A great many must be watching you<n>with keen
interest.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Satono Diamond in the middle<n>of a press
interview.

text_block_list.name: Repórter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your enlightening<n>comments, Satono
Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Repórter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there have been a great<n>number of
voices eagerly awaiting<n>the release of your
exclusive<n>interview.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really now? How wonderful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Repórter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can see that the public have<n>lofty
expectations for you indeed.

text_block_list.name: Repórter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I'd better ensure that I do the best<n>job I can as
well! Now, if you'll<n>excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Lofty expectations, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was a splendid interview,<n>Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah, McQueen! Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As the reporter mentioned, your<n>article is likely to
be read by a lot of<n>people.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That certainly would be lovely!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...You don't happen to feel under<n>pressure, do
you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I appreciate your concern, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I'm quite all right!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My family and all of their<n>acquaintances have
been kind<n>enough to celebrate my birth and<n>wish
for my success.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Their support has always been a<n>source of
comfort and<n>encouragement to me—never a
burden!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it appears I was worried for<n>nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So it's not pressure you feel, but<n>inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Fulfilling one's born duties is no<n>small feat, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know! But I embrace the challenge,<n>McQueen!
